concerns.text: SC-002 (Cross-stress R² drop) is listed as addressed by 'code/models/evaluate.py', but the plan's 'FR/SC Mapping' table and 'Compute Feasibility' sections do not explicitly define the 'Raw Feature' baseline model required to calculate the comparative drop metric. The previous kickback noted that Task T020 only implements a 'Stress-Blind Baseline' (regressing out stress) and missed the 'Raw Feature' baseline. Without a specific plan element (phase, contract, or task) explicitly describing the training of this 'Raw Feature' baseline and the calculation of the delta against it, SC-002 remains unbacked in the plan.
